name: files
description: Read, write, and list files within the user's accessible Elowen repositories.

configSchema.label: Limits
configSchema.hint: Output size caps for file reads and searches.

configSchema.label: Read cap
configSchema.hint: Max bytes read from a file and returned before truncation.

configSchema.label: Search max matches
configSchema.hint: Max number of matches Search returns before truncating.
